hooks.command: if (git diff --name-only | grep -qE '^(agents/|chip_design_agent/agents/|chip_design_agent/\.claude/agents/)') 2>/dev/null || (git ls-files --others --exclude-standard | grep -qE '^(agents/|chip_design_agent/agents/|chip_design_agent/\.claude/agents/)') 2>/dev/null; then git add -A && git commit -m "chore: auto-sync agent updates" 2>/dev/null && git push 2>/dev/null || true; fi
